mapper.select: SELECT * FROM middleware_commands WHERE middleware_type_id = #{middlewareTypeId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC
SELECT * FROM middleware_commands ORDER BY middleware_type_id ASC, sort_order ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO middleware_commands (middleware_type_id, command_format, brief_description, detailed_description, categories, sort_order) VALUES (#{middlewareTypeId}, #{commandFormat}, #{briefDescription}, #{detailedDescription}, #{categories}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.update: UPDATE middleware_commands SET middleware_type_id=#{middlewareTypeId}, command_format=#{commandFormat}, brief_description=#{briefDescription}, detailed_description=#{detailedDescription}, categories=#{categories}, sort_order=#{sortOrder} WHERE id=#{id}
